case_title: CHRISTELLE CLAUDIA POUANI VS. CECILIA DE CARMEN BOYER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-30-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 (W. TRUPEK, 506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED MAY-11-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOYER, CECILIA DE CARMEN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY POUANI, CHRISTELLE CLAUDIA AS TO DEFENDANT BOYER, CECILIA DE CARMEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-05-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-16-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHRISTELLE CLAUDIA POUANI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CECILIA DE CARMEN BOYER IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR AN $800 PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFF. THE CHECK IS TENDERED IN COURT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IT MADE, OR THE CHECK DOESN'T CLEAR. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE JUN-16-2021 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
